episodes.title: Pam Bondi to testify in Jeffrey Epstein probe; lawmakers look into potential mismanagement
episodes.description: Pam Bondi to testify in Jeffrey Epstein probe; lawmakers look into potential mismanagement.

episodes.title: U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi ordered to testify in Jeffrey Epstein probe
episodes.description: Bondi has been subpoenaed to face questions by the House Oversight Committee.

episodes.title: Longtime Epstein accountant answers questions on Epstein's crimes
episodes.description: Richard Khan spoke behind closed doors with members of Congress and claims not to have known of Epstein's crimes.

episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein's longtime accountant questioned about the convicted sex offender's finances
episodes.description: Richard Kahn gave lawmakers insight into Jeffrey Epstein's financial transactions.

episodes.title: DOJ publishes missing Epstein files involving claims about Trump
episodes.description: The files involve accusations made by a woman against President Donald Trump that officials said were "mistakenly withheld" during an earlier review.

episodes.title: House Oversight recommends holding the Clintons in contempt over Epstein subpoenas
episodes.description: The Committee made the recommendation after the Clintons failed to comply with the committee subpoenas related to the investigation
